approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ
approve_date.nulltext: คีย์วันที่อนุมัติ วันที่เปลี่ยนแปลงไม่ต้องคีย์ก็ได้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no, '-ทะเบียน ' || sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no as membership_no, sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date, pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date) as share_stock , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as approve_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, '-'||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no)) as member_group , '-เงินเดือน '||REPLACE(to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),RIGHT(to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),3),null) as member_salary , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, (SELECT last_period FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no) as last_period, (SELECT principal_balance FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no) as principal_balance, sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.remark FROM sc_lon_m_coll_change_head, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE 1=1 and sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '083287' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_status ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date

r_tge_app_change_coll_loan_old_nest.sql:
select decode(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.seq_no , null ,null ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.seq_no ||'.' ) as seq_no, decode(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno , null ,null ,'-ทะเบียน '||trim((sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno ))) as old_collateral_refno , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_description, decode(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno , null ,null ,'-'||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno)))as old_member_group , decode(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno , null ,null ,'-เงินเดือน '||REPLACE(to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno)),RIGHT(to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno)),3),null)) as old_salary , decode(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno , null ,null ,'-ทะเบียน '||trim((sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno ))) as new_collateral_refno , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_description, decode(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno , null ,null ,'-'||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno)))as new_member_group , decode(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno , null ,null ,'-เงินเดือน '||REPLACE(to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno)),RIGHT(to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno)),3),null)) as new_salary , decode(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_amount , 0 , null , to_snumber(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_amount) ) as new_collateral_amount from sc_lon_m_coll_change_det
where sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.change_doc_no = {0}
